summary: Soundboard recording suffers from drop‑outs and volume fluctuations that make the first set difficult to follow; musical performance not evaluated.
review: The sole review notes significant technical problems – audible drop‑outs and abrupt volume changes – especially in the first set, preventing the listener from getting past it. No comments are made about the band's playing or specific songs, so the show quality remains indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review focused on recording flaws; no musical praise or criticism to boost the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Drop‑outs and volume changes in the first set make listening difficult; otherwise typical soundboard clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Not assessable – reviewer did not reach the second set and gave no musical feedback.
